label: MAVLink AI - 12 Onboard Companion Debug Storyboard
info: Debug-only storyboard for an onboard companion computer running Node-RED on a Raspberry Pi. This flow does not include a MAVLink connection and does not send messages to a vehicle. It emits the planned routine to Debug only.

name: Debug-only onboard companion routine
info: Assumes Node-RED is running onboard a Raspberry Pi or similar companion computer. This is a storyboard only: no mavlink-ai-connection node, no mavlink-ai-out node, no aircraft control output. The routine shown is: takeoff, circle, barrel roll, 360, tilt left/right/front/back, return, land.

name: Build debug-only routine
